compiled_state.title: issue-quality-check.sh line count parsing fails on multiline descriptions
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral. Score: 0 (severity=0, complexity=0, env=0) → BASIC investigation.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Investigation: Root cause is broader than title suggests. issue-quality-check.sh assumes ticket show outputs YAML frontmatter + markdown, but v3 ticket system outputs JSON. The entire parsing logic (ticket_type extraction at line 40, description extraction at lines 46-51, AC section parsing at lines 68-73, file impact parsing at lines 78-84) is broken for v3 JSON output. Need to rewrite the parser to handle JSON. Score reassessment: complexity=2 (multi-section rewrite), total=3 → still BASIC tier.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
